entry.title: Making a new website
entry.content:
Recently, I got bored of the look of my website, so I decided to mix things up and create a new website. Currently, I am rather baffled by the vast number of softwares one can use to create a personal website. Initially, I thought that creating a website using plan html is the way for me, but soon I realized that it is probably too problematic to keep all the info in a single file. Somehow, I get to know jekyll , which is a static website builder tool. Although I have still much to learn, I have to say that I really like the way how jekyll works.

Needless to say that I should be writing my thesis :).
entry.summary: Recently, I got bored of the look of my website, so I decided to mix things up and create a new website. Currently, I am rather baffled by the vast number of softwares one can use to create a personal website. Initially, I thought that creating a website using plan html is the way for me, but soon I realized that it is probably too problematic to keep all the info in a single file. Somehow, I get to know jekyll , which is a static website builder tool. Although I have still much to learn, I have to say that I really like the way how jekyll works.
